supply_chain.dependencies: CarelonRx delegates certain core pharmacy services to CaremarkPCS Health, L.L.C., a subsidiary of CVS Health Corporation, pursuant to the CVS Agreement with the current contractual term extending through December 31, 2027
supply_chain.risks: Failure by CVS to provide pharmacy benefit manager services as contractually required could have a material adverse effect on business, reputation and results of operations

regulatory_risks: Changes in federal and state healthcare laws and regulations including ACA modifications
Medicare and Medicaid program changes including payment rates, quality bonus payments, and risk adjustment audits
CMS Star Ratings system changes affecting Medicare Advantage bonus payments
Minimum medical loss ratio (MLR) requirements and rebate obligations
State insurance department regulations and capital requirements
BCBSA license agreement requirements and restrictions
HIPAA and HITECH Act privacy and security requirements
State data privacy laws including California Privacy Rights Act
Mental health parity regulations issued by Tri-Agencies
Health plan price transparency regulations
Surprise medical billing regulations under Consolidated Appropriations Act of 2021
Pharmacy benefit manager regulations at federal and state levels
Drug pricing regulations and rebate requirements
Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax under Inflation Reduction Act
Medicaid eligibility redetermination requirements
Premium Tax Credit expiration risk at end of 2025
ERISA regulations for employee benefit plans
State guaranty fund assessment requirements
Risk-based capital (RBC) requirements for insurance and HMO subsidiaries
California Department of Managed Health Care (DMHC) regulations
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act for international operations
Anti-fraud, anti-corruption, and anti-money laundering regulations internationally
